name: Concrete Block Calculator
seo_description: Calculate concrete blocks and mortar for walls and partitions. Free construction calculator.

range_hints.descontar_huecos: Total area of openings to deduct

result_context: Wall of {area_neta} m² requires {bloques_ud} concrete blocks (40x20x20cm) and {mortar_kg} kg of mortar.
formula_display: Net area = (Length x Height) - Openings; Blocks = Net area x 12.5 per m²
mistakes: Not accounting for waste from cuts at corners and intersections
Using incorrect block yield (standard 40x20cm block yields 12.5/m²)
Not ordering special blocks for corners and lintels
desc: Concrete Block Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
